generated_note: Run scripts/scoring.py after updating any CSV in /data to refresh this file.

sub_metrics.description: Net new pipeline value created this quarter vs last, sourced from CRM. Signals whether top-of-funnel demand generation is keeping pace with targets.
Closed-won bookings this quarter against the quota set with Atlassian/leadership. The single clearest signal of commercial performance.
Percentage of Deal-Registered opportunities that closed won. Reflects how effectively registered pipeline converts to revenue.
Joint marketing activities (webinars, content, events) delivered against the quarter's plan with Atlassian.
Share of allocated Market Development Funds actually drawn down and spent. Low utilization risks funds being reclaimed or programs being deprioritized.
Leads generated directly from marketing activity, feeding the sales pipeline.
Average star rating of Communardo's apps on the Atlassian Marketplace — a public signal of product quality visible to Atlassian and prospects.
How complete and up to date Communardo's public profile is on the Atlassian Partner Directory.

sub_metrics.notes: LIVE — driven by the automated 12h web scan for Communardo mentions; this is the only non-zero sub-metric in the whole reset, by design
sub_metrics.description: Count of public mentions of Communardo found by the automated web scan — the only metric in this scorecard driven entirely by live, automated data rather than manual entry.
Customer success stories published and available to share with Atlassian and prospects.

sub_metrics.sub_metric: Internal AI tool adoption rate (e.g. Rovo)
sub_metrics.description: Share of relevant staff actively using Atlassian's AI tooling (e.g. Rovo) internally — a leading indicator Atlassian evaluates for AI-forward partners.
Number of customer engagements this quarter that specifically involved AI capability (Rovo, AI-powered workflows, etc.).
Staff certifications completed in Atlassian's AI-related enablement tracks.
Number of Quarterly Business Reviews actually held with Atlassian against the expected cadence.
Progress against the goals set out in the joint business plan agreed with Atlassian.
Share of action items from prior QBRs that were actually closed out — a proxy for how seriously the partnership follows through.
Number of deals registered with Atlassian and approved, protecting margin and signaling active pipeline to the vendor.

sub_metrics.notes: RESET 2026-07-01 — awaiting real data; confirm with Atlassian whether PVR is still an active program before re-entering data
sub_metrics.description: Registrations under Atlassian's Partner Value Registration program, recognizing partner-sourced value beyond a single deal.
Registered services engagements, recognizing services-attach as part of the partner value delivered.
Count of active joint engagements with other system integrators or ISV partners.
Revenue where a third-party vendor or partner referral was a material factor.
Deals registered in AWS's ACE (APN Customer Engagements) co-sell program.
Joint engagements run through Google's partner co-sell motion.
Pipeline value being jointly pursued with Global System Integrators.
Distinct packaged solutions built this quarter (repeatable offerings, not one-off custom work).
Instances of a packaged solution actually sold to a client.
Revenue directly attributable to packaged solution sales.

sub_metrics.notes: RESET 2026-07-01 — awaiting real data; see solution_verticals.csv
sub_metrics.description: Number of industry verticals with at least one packaged solution, out of the target range — breadth of the solution portfolio.
Total services revenue (implementation, consulting, managed services) sold this quarter.

sub_metrics.sub_metric: Number of clients who purchased services
sub_metrics.description: Distinct clients who purchased any services this quarter — breadth of services attach.

news.headline: Communardo strengthens European presence with expansion into the Benelux region
news.summary: Acquisition of Dutch Atlassian Platinum partner Prepend, expanding Communardo's European footprint.

news.headline: Communardo scales as an Atlassian & Microsoft platform across Europe
news.summary: Coverage of Communardo's growth as Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner and Marketplace vendor.

news.headline: Communardo acquires Ambientia's Atlassian business in Finland
news.summary: Communardo acquired Ambientia's Atlassian business, expanding its presence into Finland as part of its Nordic growth strategy.

news.headline: Communardo acquires Austrian Atlassian Platinum Partner ByteSource
news.summary: Communardo acquired ByteSource, Austria's leading Atlassian Platinum Partner and first AWS Premier Tier Partner, strengthening its DACH-region and cloud/DevOps capabilities.

news.headline: Communardo Group acquires Copenhagen-based Aety, scaling Danish presence past 480 employees
news.summary: Communardo acquired Danish Atlassian consultancy Aety, growing the group to more than 480 employees and building a full delivery organization in Denmark.

news.headline: Florence Heinen appointed VP Operations Atlassian Professional Services
news.summary: Communardo created a new group-level leadership role, naming Florence Heinen VP Operations for Atlassian Professional Services effective June 1, 2026.

news.headline: Communardo Experts launches as a joint venture with Spirit Experts in Morocco
news.summary: Communardo formed a joint venture, Communardo Experts GmbH, with Spirit Experts to build an Atlassian delivery hub in Casablanca, extending into the MENA region.

news.headline: Communardo Group GmbH acquires Computas Opus, becoming Atlassian market leader in Norway
news.summary: Communardo acquired Norwegian Atlassian Platinum Partner Computas Opus, establishing itself as the market leader in Norway's Atlassian ecosystem.

news.headline: celix joins the Communardo Group
news.summary: Communardo acquired Austrian Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner celix Solutions GmbH, strengthening its market leadership in the DACH region.

news.headline: Partnership with Mibex strengthens software portfolio
news.summary: Communardo acquired Swiss Atlassian Gold Marketplace Partner Mibex Software, adding a DevOps-focused app portfolio serving over 2,700 customers.

news.headline: Communardo enters Nordic market with acquisition of Stretch Addera in Sweden
news.summary: Communardo acquired Swedish Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner Stretch Addera, entering the Nordic market and reinforcing its position as a pan-European Atlassian leader.

news.headline: Communardo expands Industry Advisory Board with Seidensticker and Kranebitter
news.summary: Communardo added Dr. Franz-Josef Seidensticker as Chairman and Christian Kranebitter to its Industry Advisory Board to support market expansion and process professionalization.

news.headline: Communardo partners with Bregal Unternehmerkapital to drive growth strategy and European expansion
news.summary: Bregal Unternehmerkapital funds invested in Communardo Holding GmbH to accelerate its customer-centric growth strategy, European expansion, and service/software portfolio extension.

news.headline: Anje Hickey appointed CEO for Atlassian Professional Services in Europe
news.summary: Communardo named Anje Hickey, former CEO of Fellowmind Germany and 12-year Microsoft veteran, as CEO of its Atlassian Professional Services business across Europe effective January 1, 2026.

news.headline: Communardo Products rebrands as Elevatic unifying Marketplace app portfolio
news.summary: Communardo Products rebranded as Elevatic, consolidating the former Communardo Products, bitvoodoo, and Mibex brands into one independent Atlassian Marketplace vendor.

news.headline: Communardo extends Nordic market leadership with acquisition of Danish Atlassian partner Aety
news.summary: BU Partners' own coverage of Communardo's acquisition of Danish Atlassian consultancy Aety, extending its Nordic market leadership (signed April 30, 2026).

news.headline: Paul Hastings advised Bregal on acquisition of Mibex by Communardo
news.summary: Law firm Paul Hastings announced (Dec 19, 2024) it advised Bregal Unternehmerkapital on Communardo Group's acquisition of Atlassian Gold Marketplace Partner Mibex Software.

news.headline: PROM12 to sell Communardo Holding GmbH to Bregal Unternehmerkapital
news.summary: Law firm Loyens & Loeff announced (Sept 6, 2024) it served as Swiss legal advisor to PROM12 on the sale of a majority stake in Communardo Holding GmbH to Bregal Unternehmerkapital.

news.headline: Communardo Has Agreed to be Acquired by Bregal Unternehmerkapital
news.summary: William Blair announced (Sept 4, 2024) it acted as exclusive financial advisor to Communardo, then a PROM12 portfolio company, on its agreed sale to Bregal Unternehmerkapital.

news.headline: Communardo Group welcomes Stretch Addera as a new partner
news.summary: BU Partners' coverage of Communardo Group welcoming Swedish Atlassian Platinum Partner Stretch Addera, marking its Nordic market entry.

news.headline: Acquisition Strengthens Communardo's Market Position in Germany
news.summary: Communardo blog post (April 25, 2024) announcing the integration of German IT service provider Scolution into the Communardo Group, strengthening its Atlassian market position and regional presence in Swabian Hall.

news.headline: Communardo Group extends Nordic platform with the acquisition of Aety
news.summary: Danish law firm Accura's case page describing its advisory role for Communardo Group in its acquisition of Aety, extending the group's Nordic Atlassian platform to roughly 100 specialists.

news.headline: German Communardo Group, backed by Bregal Unternehmerkapital (BU), acquires Swedish Atlassian partner Stretch Addera
news.summary: M&A intelligence tracker NKP/Mainsights' historical coverage (May 27, 2025) of Communardo Group's acquisition of Swedish Atlassian partner Stretch Addera, including deal financial details.

news.headline: Expanding Nordic Coverage: Communardo Group Adds Ambientia's Atlassian Business
news.summary: Communardo Nordics blog post (Jan 8, 2026) on the acquisition of Ambientia's Atlassian business in Finland, extending Nordic coverage to Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Finland.

news.headline: Stretch Addera joins Communardo Group
news.summary: Communardo Nordics (formerly Stretch Addera) blog post (May 27, 2025) announcing Stretch Addera joining the Communardo Group, forming a group of 420+ Atlassian experts.

news.headline: Expanding Nordic Coverage: Communardo Group Adds Ambientia's Atlassian Business
news.summary: Mirror of the Communardo Nordics blog post on stretchaddera.com, covering the Ambientia Atlassian business acquisition in Finland.

news.headline: Stretch Addera joins Communardo Group
news.summary: Mirror of the Communardo Nordics blog post on stretchaddera.com, announcing Stretch Addera joining the Communardo Group.

news.headline: Communardo GmbH - Atlassian Solutions Partner Directory listing
news.summary: Atlassian's official partner directory profile for Communardo GmbH shows Platinum Solution Partner status, a 5.0 rating, and Atlassian Partner of the Year awards for 2019, 2023, and 2025 (Cloud Platform Solutions).

news.headline: Elevatic, Communardo Group's software business, to acquire Atlassian marketplace vendor Elements
news.summary: Elevatic Software GmbH, the Communardo Group's software business, agreed to acquire France-based Atlassian Marketplace vendor Elements APPS SAS, adding Service Management as a third solution area to its portfolio.

news.headline: Elevatic enters into a put option agreement to acquire Elements
news.summary: M&A advisory firm Clipperton's announcement of Elevatic's put option agreement to acquire Atlassian Marketplace vendor Elements, adding Service Management capabilities to Elevatic's portfolio.

news.headline: Communardo strengthens its presence in Norway through the acquisition of Computas Opus
news.summary: BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital's coverage of Communardo Group's acquisition of Norwegian Atlassian Platinum Partner Computas Opus, establishing market leadership across all four Nordic countries.

news.headline: SWNetwork joins the Communardo Group and strengthens DevOps capabilities
news.summary: Communardo Group acquired Atlassian DevOps specialist SWNetwork (founded 2016), strengthening its DevOps consulting and solution development capabilities; all SWNetwork employees join Communardo's existing DevOps team.

news.headline: Communardo and Mibex Software join forces
news.summary: Communardo Group's own press release (Dec 17, 2024) announcing its acquisition of Swiss Atlassian Gold Marketplace Partner Mibex Software, strengthening its DevOps app portfolio serving 2,700+ customers.

news.headline: Paul Hastings advises BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital on acquisition of Stretch Addera by Communardo
news.summary: Law firm Paul Hastings announced it advised BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital on Communardo's acquisition of Swedish Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner Stretch Addera, marking Communardo's entry into the Nordic market.

news.headline: Communardo Acquires Stretch Addera from Stretch AB
news.summary: Global Legal Chronicle's coverage of Communardo Group's acquisition of Stretch Addera AB, a leading Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner in Sweden, and the legal advisors involved.

news.headline: BU-backed Communardo adds on Stretch Addera
news.summary: PE Hub's private-equity trade coverage of BU-backed Communardo Group's add-on acquisition of Swedish Atlassian partner Stretch Addera.

news.headline: Communardo Switzerland - Atlassian Solutions Partner Directory listing
news.summary: Atlassian's official partner directory profile for Communardo Switzerland (formerly bitvoodoo) shows Platinum Solution Partner status, 46 sales and 24 delivery accreditations, and a 2023 Marketing Innovator award.

news.headline: Elevatic - Atlassian Marketplace vendor listing
news.summary: Atlassian Marketplace vendor profile for Elevatic (formerly Communardo Products, bitvoodoo, and Mibex), listing Platinum Marketplace and Solution Partner status and its portfolio of 16+ Confluence/Jira/Bitbucket apps.

news.headline: BU-backed Communardo buys Celix Solutions in Austria
news.summary: PE Hub's trade coverage of BU-backed Communardo Group's acquisition of Austrian Atlassian consultancy Celix Solutions, strengthening its DACH-region market position.

news.headline: Paul Hastings advises Bregal on acquisition of Celix by Communardo
news.summary: Law firm Paul Hastings announced it advised Bregal Unternehmerkapital on Communardo's acquisition of Austrian Atlassian partner Celix Solutions.

news.headline: Communardo welcomes celix as a new partner
news.summary: BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital's own coverage of Communardo Group welcoming Austrian Atlassian specialist celix, strengthening its market position in Austria.

news.headline: celix wird zu Communardo Austria (brand transition FAQ)
news.summary: celix Solutions' customer FAQ page announcing its rebrand to Communardo Austria GmbH as part of deeper integration into the Communardo Group, with contracts and contacts unchanged.

news.headline: Communardo weitet Europa-Präsenz aus
news.summary: ChannelPartner (Jan 12, 2026) reports Communardo expanded into the Netherlands (Prepend) and Finland (Ambientia) in late 2025/early 2026, putting it in nine European countries as it pursues becoming Europe's largest Atlassian partner.

news.headline: Communardo acquires Ambientia's Atlassian business in Finland (Chambers legal highlight)
news.summary: Chambers and Partners legal highlight (Jan 20, 2026) on Avance advising Communardo Group in its acquisition of Ambientia Group's Atlassian business in Finland, backed by BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital.

news.headline: 15 Monate Partnerschaft mit Bregal Unternehmerkapital
news.summary: Silicon Saxony member profile (Feb 4, 2026) reporting Communardo's positive 15-month interim assessment of its BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital partnership: 460+ employees, 21 locations, seven acquisitions, and quotes from Atlassian's Head of International Partners and Alliances praising Communardo's growth.

news.headline: Communardo gewinnt Bregal Unternehmerkapital als Partner
news.summary: Bregal's own announcement (German) of its partnership with Communardo Holding GmbH to drive its customer-centric growth strategy and European expansion.

news.headline: Case Study: Bregal Unternehmerkapital x Communardo
news.summary: Code and Co. case study describing its tech/product due-diligence engagement for Bregal Unternehmerkapital on the Communardo transaction.

news.headline: GOF advises PROM12 on the sale of Communardo to Bregal Unternehmerkapital
news.summary: Law firm GOF announced it advised PROM12 on the sale of a majority stake in Communardo to Bregal Unternehmerkapital.

news.headline: Communardo gewinnt Bregal Unternehmerkapital als Partner (PROM12 announcement)
news.summary: PROM12's own press release (German) announcing Communardo winning Bregal Unternehmerkapital as a partner to drive its customer-centric growth strategy and European expansion.

news.headline: BU-backed software company Communardo acquires Austrian IT firm ByteSource
news.summary: M&A intelligence tracker Mainsights' coverage of BU-backed Communardo's acquisition of Austrian Atlassian Platinum Partner ByteSource, strengthening its DACH and cloud/DevOps capabilities.

news.headline: aety Acquired by Communardo
news.summary: Signalbase M&A news tracker coverage of Communardo's acquisition of Danish Atlassian consultancy Aety, extending its Nordic market leadership.

news.headline: Communardo Sweden AB - Atlassian Solutions Partner Directory listing
news.summary: Atlassian's official partner directory profile for Communardo Sweden AB (formerly Stretch Addera) shows Platinum Solution Partner status, 86 delivery/107 sales accreditations, and a 2018 Atlassian Partner of the Year: Cloud award.

qbr.label: QBR
qbr.description: Quarterly Business Review with Atlassian or a joint QBR involving a customer.

meeting.label: Meeting
meeting.description: General meeting or call with an Atlassian contact, customer, or ecosystem partner.

enablement.label: Enablement
enablement.description: Training, certification, or enablement session — given or received.

co_sell.label: Co-sell activity
co_sell.description: Joint selling activity with Atlassian, AWS, Google, or a GSI.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.description: Workshop or working session with a customer or Atlassian.

escalation_support.label: Escalation support
escalation_support.description: Supporting or resolving a customer or partner escalation.

marketplace_activity.label: Marketplace activity
marketplace_activity.description: Work on an Atlassian Marketplace app, listing, or submission.

deal_support.label: Deal support
deal_support.description: Direct support on a specific deal or opportunity.

program_admin.label: Program administration
program_admin.description: Partner program administration — registrations, renewals, compliance.

other.label: Other
other.description: Anything not covered above — explain in the notes field.

initiated.label: Initiated
initiated.description: You started this — it wouldn't have happened without you raising it.

led.label: Led
led.description: You owned and drove this activity end to end.

influenced.label: Influenced
influenced.description: You shaped the outcome without owning the activity outright.

supported.label: Supported
supported.description: You contributed to someone else's activity.

connected.label: Connected
connected.description: You made an introduction or connection that enabled this.

accelerated.label: Accelerated
accelerated.description: You sped up something already in motion.

protected.label: Protected
protected.description: You prevented a loss, churn, or negative outcome.

other.label: Other
other.description: Anything not covered above — explain in the notes field.

open.label: Open
open.description: Not started or in progress. The default status for a new action. Eligible for overdue/due-soon calculation.

blocked.label: Blocked
blocked.description: Cannot proceed — waiting on the dependency named in the action's 'dependency' field (a person, decision, or another action). Still eligible for overdue/due-soon calculation, since being blocked doesn't move the due date.

deferred.label: Deferred
deferred.description: Explicitly pushed to a new due date via the 'defer' command. The original due date is preserved separately in 'original_due_date' for audit history.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: Done. Set only via the 'complete' command, which stamps completed_at and — if the action was created with evidence_required — requires a completion note or evidence reference first. Terminal: excluded from overdue/due-soon.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: No longer needed. Set only via the 'cancel' command, which requires a reason. Terminal: excluded from overdue/due-soon.
